## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature or metric enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests only
- [ ] Maintenance or release hygiene

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and avoided unrelated refactoring.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated documentation, vignettes, or examples where needed.
- [ ] I verified CRAN-sensitive examples do not require uncontrolled network access.
- [ ] I ran relevant local checks and listed them below.

## Checks run

List the commands you ran, for example:

```sh
R CMD build .
R CMD check --as-cran rfair_*.tar.gz
```

## Related issues or references

Link issues, metric definitions, upstream F-UJI behavior, or standards that
support the change.
